\section*{Advanced Analytics}
\subsection*{Growth Projections (Q1 2025)}
\begin{itemize}
\item \textbf{Spotify Streams}: 1.7M/mo (13.3\% MoM growth)
\item \textbf{Revenue Forecast}:
  \begin{itemize}
  \item Spotify: \$5,100/mo (\$0.003/stream)
  \item Other Platforms: \$3,000/mo
  \item Total Q1: \$24,300 (\pm 8\%)
  \end{itemize}
\item \textbf{Market Expansion Potential}:
  \begin{equation}
  \text{Germany Growth} = 10\% \times 1.25^{(\text{MoM})} \quad \text{Mexico Growth} = 15\% \times 1.18^{(\text{MoM})}
  \end{equation}
\end{itemize}

\subsection*{Key Performance Drivers}
\begin{longtable}{|l|l|r|}
\hline
\textbf{Factor} & \textbf{Impact} & \textbf{Contribution} \\
\hline
Release Frequency (6.5/mo) & +40\% vs Genre Average & \$9,200/Q1 \\
US Market Dominance & 70\% Listener Base & +22\% Stability \\
Playlist Performance & 15.4\% MoM Stream Growth & \$3,800/Q1 \\
\hline
\end{longtable}

\section*{Strategic Recommendations}
\begin{enumerate}
\item \textcolor{green}{Capitalize on Streaming Momentum}
\begin{itemize}
\item Target 12\% MoM playlist growth through curated pitching
\item Optimize release schedule to 8 tracks/month (+23\%)
\end{itemize}

\item \textcolor{orange}{Social Media Revitalization}
\begin{itemize}
\item Instagram engagement boost via live DJ content (Target: 15\% ER)
\item YouTube channel creation (+100 subscribers/month KPI)
\end{itemize}

\item \textcolor{blue}{Market Expansion}
\begin{itemize}
\item German-language track adaptations (ROI: 1:4.3 est)
\item Mexico City virtual concert initiative
\end{itemize}
\end{enumerate}
